chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-1647 of 2024 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.6397/2024 2. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 3. For orders on CMA No.6398/2024 (Ex/A) 4. For hearing of main case 04.09.2025 ************** 1. None present for the petitioner nor any intimation received. Accordingly, application for urgent hearing stands disposed of. 2. Deferred for the time being. 3. Granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 4. Through present petition, petitioner prays as under:- (a) to direct the respondent No.2 to take legal and lawful action against the respondents No.3to5 by binding them to pay outstanding amount of 12,61597/- with immediate effect, as the respondents No.3to5, have committed the offence of cheating and fraud with the petitioner. Since the offence of cheating and fraud is alleged in the petition and same cannot be granted by invoking the constitutional jurisdiction of this Court under Article 199 of Constitution of the Islamic Republic of Pakistan, 1973. In view of the above, present Constitution Petition, being not maintainable, stands disposed of. However, the petitioner is at liberty to avail adequate and efficacious alternate remedy available to him before the competent Court of law, if so advised. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
